name: Hajime Aoyagi
description: He is now a third-year student at Souhoku High School and has been named vice-captain. He is usually silent and only speaks when necessary. Even if he rarely speaks, he thinks a lot and cares a great deal about his friends and teammates. He is particularly close to Teshima, but he is shown to be friendly with all the Sohoku members in his third year. He seems to have developed a closer relationship with Naruko since they are both sprinters, and with Koga since he is a fellow third year. Aoyagi e

name: Haruya Nagumo
description: __Nationality:__ Japanese A rebellious and fearless player from Alien Academy, one of the top 3. Endo and others mistake him for Goenji, when they visited Okinawa, because of _Fire Striker_ nickname. Nagumo challenged Endo's team for one match. He easily scored goals and proved his outstanding skills.

name: Hiroshi Kumagawa
description: He is part of the Body Improvement Club and a student of Salt Middle School.

name: Ichiru Kiryuu
description: Zero's younger twin brother. When they were younger, they were both taught by Touga Yagari, though Ichiru did not seem to share Zero's natural ability because he was sickly. Zero and Ichiru were very close as children, although later Ichiru claims to have hated Zero after overhearing that his parents preferred Zero over himself. Ichiru now has been cured due to drinking Shizuka's blood and has appeared at Cross Academy as a student by the orders of Shiki's father. Wikipedia

name: Jin Ootomo
description: Harutora's homeroom teacher. A fairly quirky fellow who tends be more laid back then one would expect from a teacher, to the point where some would accuse him of being irresponsible. Despite that, he's usually good at giving solid advice to students and is known activist against the school's harsh policies when comes to education. name: Kanazawa
description: A traveler Chito and Yuuri meet while trying to find a path to the upper stratum of the city. He is a cartographer who wants to map the entire city.

name: Kanenogi
description: A cryptid. He chose male highschool student Hinowa Tomari for his bride. His main diet is construction materials. His fur is amazingly soft.

name: Kanzashi Sarashiki
description: Kanzashi Sarashiki is a 1st year student at the IS Academy in Class Four, younger sister of the Student Council President, Tatenashi Sarashiki and the IS Representative Candidate of Japan. She appears in Volume 7.

name: Kaufman
description: Grand Duke Kaufman is a Prince from the desert Kingdom of Luipt and a knowledgeable magician.

name: Kozue Matsumoto
description: **Age**: 17 **Height**: 160cm **Fighting style**: none A girl from Baki's school, her mother is Baki's landlord. Her father fought and died in the Underground arena. She cares deeply for Baki, but denies when asked. She is disillusioned by Baki's violent life as an Underground fighter and begs him several times to quit. Though she still disapproves, Kozue better understands Baki's resolve after visiting Emi's grave site. After Baki's first tournament match, he reveals that he cares for Kozue.
